queries.cases:
let
    Source = Csv.Document(File.Contents("<demo-or-production-folder>\\cases.csv"), [Delimiter = ",", Encoding = 65001, QuoteStyle = QuoteStyle.Csv]),
    PromotedHeaders = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars = true]),
    ChangedType = Table.TransformColumnTypes(PromotedHeaders, {{"ProcessID", type text}, {"ProcessName", type text}, {"CaseID", type text}, {"CaseName", type text}, {"Domain", type text}, {"OwnerRole", type text}, {"OwnerName", type text}, {"Region", type text}, {"PlantID", type text}, {"BusinessPartner", type text}, {"CurrentStage", type text}, {"StartDate", type date}, {"TargetDate", type date}, {"ActualOrForecastDate", type date}, {"TargetCycleDays", Int64.Type}, {"ActualCycleDays", Int64.Type}, {"SlaBreached", type logical}, {"RootCause", type text}, {"RevenueValue", type number}, {"RiskScore", Int64.Type}, {"ActionRequired", type logical}}, "en-US")
in
    ChangedType
queries.events:
let
    Source = Csv.Document(File.Contents("<demo-or-production-folder>\\events.csv"), [Delimiter = ",", Encoding = 65001, QuoteStyle = QuoteStyle.Csv]),
    PromotedHeaders = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars = true]),
    ChangedType = Table.TransformColumnTypes(PromotedHeaders, {{"ProcessID", type text}, {"ProcessName", type text}, {"CaseID", type text}, {"EventSequence", Int64.Type}, {"EventName", type text}, {"EventDate", type date}, {"SourceSystem", type text}, {"TouchedBy", type text}, {"AutomationFlag", type logical}, {"ReworkFlag", type logical}, {"EventCost", type number}}, "en-US")
in
    ChangedType
queries.kpi_snapshots:
let
    Source = Csv.Document(File.Contents("<demo-or-production-folder>\\kpi_snapshots.csv"), [Delimiter = ",", Encoding = 65001, QuoteStyle = QuoteStyle.Csv]),
    PromotedHeaders = Table.PromoteHeaders(Source, [PromoteAllScalars = true]),
    ChangedType = Table.TransformColumnTypes(PromotedHeaders, {{"ProcessID", type text}, {"ProcessName", type text}, {"Period", type text}, {"KPIName", type text}, {"ActualValue", type number}, {"TargetValue", type number}, {"Tolerance", type number}, {"Status", type text}, {"OwnerRole", type text}, {"SourceSystems", type text}}, "en-US")
in
    ChangedType
